page.title: Forecast Job Executions
page.description: Monitor and manage your forecast job executions

detail.graphUnavailableDescription: The pipeline graph is not available for this job.
detail.specUnavailableDescription: The original configuration was not stored for this job.

actions.confirmRestart: This will re-execute the job with the same specification. Continue?
actions.confirmDelete: This will permanently delete this job and its results. This action cannot be undone.

submit.title: Submit Forecast Job
submit.name: Name
submit.namePlaceholder: Enter a name for this job
submit.namePlaceholderOptional: Name this run to find it later (optional)
submit.tagsPlaceholderOptional: Tag this run for easy filtering (optional)
submit.maxDelayHelp: If a scheduled run is delayed longer than this, it will be skipped instead of running late.

outputs.noOutputsRunning: Outputs will appear here as they are generated.
outputs.noMatch: No outputs match the current filter.

viewer.zoomHint: Wheel to zoom · Drag to pan · Shift+drag to zoom into a region

compilation.experimental: Experimental view — subject to change or complete removal.
compilation.fullDescription: Task-level graph compiled from this run. Click a block on the left to focus its cluster; click a task to focus its block.
compilation.forceDescription: Drag a task to rearrange, click a block on the left to focus its cluster, hover to highlight lineage.
compilation.unavailableDescription: This run was submitted before compilation detail was recorded, or its cache entry has expired.
compilation.tooLargeTitle: Layered view unavailable for graphs this large
compilation.tooLargeBody: This run compiled into {{count}} tasks. The Layered view is limited to {{limit}} tasks because it can freeze the browser at larger sizes. The Graph tab uses canvas rendering and handles much larger DAGs.
compilation.noTasks: No tasks compiled for this run.

storedOutputs.title: Stored outputs
storedOutputs.fileMissing: File not yet written by the run
storedOutputs.externalTitle: Use this WMS in another tool
storedOutputs.externalHint: Copies a standard WMS GetCapabilities URL — paste it into QGIS, ArcGIS, or any other WMS-aware client to inspect the data there. The server keeps running until you stop it on this row.
storedOutputs.wmsUnavailable: The WMS viewer is not available on this server (SkinnyWMS not installed)

lens.title: Output map viewer
lens.subtitle: All layers in this directory
lens.noLayers: No layers exposed by this lens
lens.preloadTimeStepsHelp: Fetch every time step of every active layer in the background, so the time slider scrubs without stutter. Triggers when toggled on and after layer changes — pan or zoom and re-toggle if you want fresh prefetch for a new view. Bandwidth-heavy: skip on metered connections.
lens.activeLayersHelp:
Layers currently rendered on the map.
• Add layers from the browser on the right; remove with the × on each card.
• Drag the upper part of a card to reorder — top of the list draws on top of the map stack (the same order is sent to the WMS server).
• Master opacity scales every active layer; the per-card slider tweaks one layer relative to that.
• Time-aware layers share the timeline at the bottom of this panel.
lens.timeHelp: Steps are the union of every time-aware active layer. The slider, ◀ ▶ buttons, and ▶ play autoplay all advance the same step. Layers without a time dimension are unaffected.

overview.title: Pick a parameter to view
overview.intro: Each parameter exposed by the WMS server can be added to the map. Pick one to start; multi-pressure-level parameters expand into a level picker.
overview.noWfsNote: SkinnyWMS doesn't implement WFS / GetFeatureInfo, so click-to-query isn't available here. To read raw values at a point, load the source GRIB file into a full GIS stack instead.

errors.jobNotFoundDescription: The requested job could not be found.

empty.title: No executions
empty.description: You haven't run any forecast jobs yet. Start by creating a new forecast configuration.
